x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: CSM assignment groups are used for Now Assist AI routing. Groups without members create silent AI routing failures.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Populate CSM assignment groups with active agents. Assign group managers. Ensure all groups used on CSM cases have at least one active member. Now Assist CSM AI routing depends on well-populated assignment groups.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_8e03a33acfd903108935fb251d851c90
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
<ai_justification><![CDATA[CSM assignment groups are used for Now Assist AI routing. Groups without members create silent AI routing failures.]]></ai_justification>
<check_name>CSM Assignment Group Coverage</check_name>
<check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var cutoff = new GlideDateTime();
    cutoff.addYearsUTC(-1);

    // Collect distinct assignment groups used on CSM cases in last 12 months
    var usedGroups = {};
    var grCases = new GlideRecord('sn_customerservice_case');
    grCases.addQuery('sys_created_on', '>=', cutoff.getValue());
    grCases.addQuery('assignment_group', '!=', '');
    grCases.query();
    while (grCases.next()) {
        usedGroups[grCases.getValue('assignment_group')] = true;
    }

    var groupIds = Object.keys(usedGroups);
    var totalGroups = groupIds.length;

    if (totalGroups === 0) {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: 'No assignment groups used on CSM cases in last 12 months',
            finding: 'No assignment groups found on CSM cases in the last 12 months. Now Assist CSM AI routing has no group structure to route cases to.'
        };
    }

    // Check which of those groups have active members
    var groupsWithMembers = 0;
    for (var i = 0; i < groupIds.length; i++) {
        var memGr = new GlideRecord('sys_user_grmember');
        memGr.addQuery('group', groupIds[i]);
        memGr.setLimit(1);
        memGr.query();
        if (memGr.next()) groupsWithMembers++;
    }

    var pct = Math.round((groupsWithMembers / totalGroups) * 100);
    var actualValue = totalGroups + ' CSM assignment groups used (last 12 months) | ' + groupsWithMembers + ' with active members (' + pct + '%)';

    if (groupsWithMembers >= 3 && pct >= 80) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: groupsWithMembers + ' populated CSM assignment groups. Now Assist CSM AI routing has well-defined, staffed groups to route cases to.'
        };
    } else if (groupsWithMembers >= 1) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + groupsWithMembers + ' of ' + totalGroups + ' CSM assignment groups have members. Now Assist CSM AI routing may attempt to assign cases to empty groups.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'No CSM assignment groups have active members. Now Assist CSM AI routing cannot function without populated assignment groups.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script>
<is_active>true</is_active>
<is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive>
<is_manual>false</is_manual>
<module>CSM</module>
<number>CHK0006050</number>
<order>130</order>
<remediation_guidance>Populate CSM assignment groups with active agents. Assign group managers. Ensure all groups used on CSM cases have at least one active member. Now Assist CSM AI routing depends on well-populated assignment groups.</remediation_guidance>
<sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by>
<sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_created_on>
<sys_id>8e03a33acfd903108935fb251d851c90</sys_id>
<sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count>
<sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by>
<sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_updated_on>
</x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
